Just seeing the awful news that Kiki Shepard passed away today after suffering a massive heart attack. She was 74. I just saw her Feb. 12 at the NBA All-Star Weekend Gospel Celebration. She asked me to play in her annual golf tournament. I said yes and we traded numbers. We all knew her from Showtime At The Apollo. She was a legend! RIP, Kiki.
Geez! How many turnovers has KD had in this 4th quarter for the @HoustonRockets? Dammit!

Dem candidates should STFU and focus on winning their races. This talk is stupid.


Andrew Solender (@AndrewSolender)

NEW: Jeffries may face a fight to become speaker in '27 even if Dems take the House

More Dem candidates tell @axios their vote is not a given.

"He's been failing to meet the moment," one told me

Said another: "I cannot support this kind of leadership" axios.com/2026/03/16/hakeem-…




— https://nitter.net/AndrewSolender/status/2033689951594848420#m

Clearly @KatieMiller is clueless about THE LAW.


Katie Miller (@KatieMiller)

Why even have elections if any district court judge can invalidate the Will of the People?



— https://nitter.net/KatieMiller/status/2033663137543541106#m
